A unique U ID Number is assigned to afﬁliates/guests as part of their initial request to receive University services and is used for all University identiﬁcation purposes.”

Appendix N: Transfer Credit Policy Maryland Higher Education Commission (Title 13B) Administrative History Effective date: December 4, 1995 (22:24 Md. R. 1901) Regulations .02, .03, and .05 amended. Effective date: July 1, 1996 (23:13 Md. R. 946) Regulations .02 and .06 amended August 2022 Authority: Education Article, 11-201 - 11-206, Annotated Code of Maryland

The full policy can be found at: https://dsd.maryland.gov/regulations/ Pages/13B.06.02.03.aspx.

Appendix O: University of Maryland Policy on Promoting Responsible Action in Medical Emergencies V-1.00(J) https://policies.umd.edu/student-affairs/university-of-maryland-policy- on-promoting-responsible-action-in-medical-emergencies/

Appendix P: University of Maryland, College Park Immunization Policy V-1.00(H) The policy below is current as of this publication. For more information and possible updates go to: https://policies.umd.edu/student-affairs/ university-of-maryland-college-park-immunization-policy/.

(Approved by the President August 1, 1991; revised June 1, 2000; amended February 4, 2014)
